headline: Woman Gets Fired For Being 'Too Productive', Boss Says She Was 'Making Everyone Look Bad'
summary: Her performance review read: 'Exceeds expectations. Unacceptable.' The irony is not lost on her.
fullBody: Amanda Overachiever was fired for completing 3 weeks of work in 5 days. 'It's not fair to the team,' her boss said. 'She's setting unrealistic standards.' Amanda now works at a competitor where her 'excessive competence' is celebrated. Her old team has been put on a 'performance improvement plan' — for underperforming. Amanda is thriving. 'I'm just really good at my job,' she said. 'Apparently, that's a problem.'
